heading: Maintenance and public inspection of list of approved applications for financial assistance
label: 3217 Maintenance and public inspection of list of approved applications for financial assistance
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 3217, , , ; , , , required annual report to Congress on operations under this chapter, prior to repeal by .Pub. L. 89–136, title VII, § 70779 Stat. 573Pub. L. 94–273, § 2690 Stat. 380Pub. L. 105–393, § 102(b)(3)Aug. 26, 1965Apr. 21, 1976
Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Feb. 11, 1999section 105 of Pub. L. 105–393section 3121 of this title
amendments: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 3217, , , ; , , , required annual report to Congress on operations under this chapter, prior to repeal by .Pub. L. 89–136, title VII, § 70779 Stat. 573Pub. L. 94–273, § 2690 Stat. 380Pub. L. 105–393, § 102(b)(3)Aug. 26, 1965Apr. 21, 1976

children.text: maintain as a permanent part of the records of the Department a list of applications approved for financial assistance under this chapter; and
make the list available for public inspection during the regular business hours of the Department.
The name of the applicant and, in the case of a corporate application, the name of each officer and director of the corporation.
The amount and duration of the financial assistance for which application is made.
The purposes for which the proceeds of the financial assistance are to be used.
